---
title: "03. 全胜、伐谋与不战而屈"
subtitle: "Total Victory, Strategic Compression, and Winning Without Battle"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 3
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 谋攻 ranks strategic targets by structural leverage, preferring low-distortion victory through folding the enemy's option space before costly collision."
---

**Chapters:** 谋攻第三  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `rate-distortion information theory`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_03_total_victory_strategic_compression.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
